form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.81) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing sixth and beaten 8 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and six places from eight starts. Has ability and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (22.81) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing sixth and beaten 8 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and six places from eight starts. Has ability and should feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels and lost ground entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 2.25 lengths second (22.98) over 400m at The Gardens. With a good start will take catching off the low draw.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 0.8 lengths at Richmond over 401m (23.13) beating Silent Minute in Grade 5 on March 27. Looks the one to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 0.8 lengths at Richmond over 401m (23.13) beating Silent Minute in Grade 5 on March 27. Looks the one to beat again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the turn out of the back straight came together multiple times.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when second (22.61) at this track, making it two placings on end. Squeeze draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time when second (22.61) at this track, making it two placings on end. Squeeze draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 2 over 324m at Richmond Straight behind Viliame beaten 6 lengths (17.93) in a Grade 5. Has a fast 22.42 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 150m mark hampered and came together.

form.formComment: Finished sixth (18.20) last start at Richmond Straight. Prior to that had recorded four minor placings in a row. Drawn out wide and will need the breaks to go his way.

form.formComment: Tends to be fast away. Last start finished sixth in a Grade 5 on March 30 over 450m at this track behind Martini Nights, beaten 11 lengths (25.64). Prefer in something easier.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when second (22.61) over 400m at this track. Wide draw here. Top-three aspirations.
